description: Out-of-scope (ocd, edge-contamination): description points clearly to ocd territory; classify should set outOfScope and return empty recommendations.

expectedQualities.notes: Should route to outOfScope with category 'ocd'. No path recommendations.

payload.intakeText: I can't stop washing my hands. I do it dozens of times a day. I have a specific number of seconds I have to wash for, a specific number of times. If I get interrupted I have to restart. My hands are raw and bleeding but I still can't stop.
